economics.skip_reason: SKIP (loud): tier resolution for this tenant is derived directly from the CRM Opportunity's amount_cents (book.py), not a CSCompany/health-score record; the sweep-driven per-tier cost ledger this section normally reports has nothing to sweep for a tenant with no CS platform.

feedback_persistence.skip_reason: SKIP (loud): crateworks has no CS platform/product telemetry, so the sweep engine (agent1.sweep._slot_b_inputs_for_account) fails closed for every account -- there is no proposal to reject/regenerate. This is the correct degraded outcome for this tenant's vendor-stack gap, not an omission.

onboarding_cost.note: crateworks is graded on the SHAPE of degradation, not a low count (docs/TENANT_CRATEWORKS_BIBLE.md section 7) -- no within_ceiling gate here.
